summary: Hand Runtime Loader Fix: local MediaPipe is served as JavaScript, uses a no-trailing-slash WASM base, and surfaces exact local task diagnostics when a browser blocks initialization.
features: CPU-first local MediaPipe hand-engine initialization for reliable Android camera inference
Local model buffer initialization with same-file local URL fallback only
Separate camera and hand-engine recovery states with no stale camera error after a stream starts
Viewport-safe drawer grid with guaranteed independent touch scrolling
Stable header mark and close control placement in Kurdish and English
Dedicated chevron grid cell and reserved select-arrow spacing for RTL labels
Android-safe DOM switch controls with visible off and on states
Editable inline toolbar undo and redo icons
Bundled local hand model, local MediaPipe runtime and offline cache coverage
